title: ReflexionReport
description: Structured self-diagnosis output emitted by the Verification agent when a check fails. The Implementer agent reads this to perform a targeted Point-to-Point fix instead of a free-form retry.

error_fingerprint.description: Stable hash of error_type + first error message. Used for circuit-breaker deduplication. Format: '<error_type>:<sha1_of_first_error_line>'.

root_cause.description: One-sentence explanation of WHY the error occurred.

issue.description: What is wrong at this location.

affected_files.description: Files that must be changed to fix the error.

search.description: Exact string to find (verbatim, unique within the file). MUST exist in the current file.

replace.description: Replacement string. May be empty string to delete.

rationale.description: Why this specific change fixes the error.

fix_plan.description: Ordered list of Point-to-Point edits the Implementer must apply verbatim.

safe_to_retry.description: false if the fix_plan cannot guarantee convergence (e.g., missing dependency, external API down). When false, the autonomous agent should escalate to the human instead of retrying.
